name: Huang Zhong

skills.name: Gunner's Spirit
skills.description: Basic Attacks increase Physical Attack and Critical Rate.

skills.name: Unleash Your Potential
skills.description: Gains a Movement Speed boost. Exits Turret Mode if it is active. Permanently gains Physical Attack upon learning.

skills.name: Lay the Mines
skills.description: Places a trap in the target area. The trap grants vision of enemies that trigger it, while also inflicting damage, slow, and sunder on them and granting Huang Zhong a shield.

skills.name: Bring out the Artillery
skills.description:
Dashes and deploys a turret while refreshing his Skill 1.
He becomes immobile, gains Attack Range, and increases his Physical and Magical Defense. Basic Attacks deal area damage.
The turret will be deactivated after a certain number of Basic Attacks.

skillsZh.name: 砲手燃魂
skillsZh.description: 每次普攻會提高自身攻擊和暴擊率。

skillsZh.name: 追擊潛能
skillsZh.description: 增加自身移速，永久增加自身攻擊力，若處於砲台形態時施放會立即解除此形態。

skillsZh.name: 警戒地雷
skillsZh.description: 在指定區域布設陷阱，獲得觸碰的目標視野並造成傷害、減速和破甲效果，同時為自身提供護盾。

skillsZh.name: 重裝砲台
skillsZh.description:
黃忠位移一段距離並進入砲台形態，同時重置1技能。
期間不可移動，會增加物理防禦和法術防禦、提升射程，每次普攻會造成範圍傷害。
普攻到達一定次數後，就會解除此形態。

tips: Huang Zhong (Marksman): Tier B — 50.88% WR (Camp HOK).
tipsZh: 黃忠（發育路）：梯度 B，勝率 50.88%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：末世、賢者的庇護、輝月.

patchHistory.detail: Huang Zhong is still full of vigor, and we hope this change will make him more flexible in combat.

patchHistoryZh.detail: 「黃忠依然充滿活力，希望他在一般形態下能夠更加靈活地戰鬥。」

faqs.question: Is Huang Zhong good in current season?
faqs.answer: Huang Zhong is Tier B Marksman with 50.88% win rate, 0.44% pick rate, and 0.02% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Huang Zhong build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Doomsday, Sage's Sanctuary, Splendor, Destiny, Haste - Sunpool, Mortal Punisher.

faqs.question: How to counter Huang Zhong?
faqs.answer: Pick Kaizer, Dun, Arthur. Strong into Xuance, Mai Shiranui, Jing.

faqsZh.question: 黃忠 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 黃忠 為 B 梯度，勝率 50.88%、選取 0.44%、禁用 0.02%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 黃忠 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：末世、賢者的庇護、輝月、名刀・司命、迅疾・日淵、制裁之刃.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 黃忠？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Kaizer、Dun、Arthur。黃忠 克制 Xuance、Mai Shiranui、Jing。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Xuance, Mai Shiranui, Jing. Weak into: Kaizer, Dun, Arthur.

guide.overview: Huang Zhong is a Medium Marksman (Farm Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 51.2% win rate and 0.5% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Huang Zhong: Basic Attacks increase attack and Critical Rate.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Sparkforged Dagger, Boots of Dexterity, Eternity Blade, then complete Daybreaker's Virtue, Starbreaker. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Red for stats that match Huang Zhong's Marksman kit. Take Haste & Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Unleash Your Potential → Lay the Mines → Bring out the Artillery → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 1 → Skill 2 → Bring out the Artillery (max Skill 1 first)
skillOrder.reason: Unleash Your Potential is your lane trade tool. Lay the Mines second. Bring out the Artillery whenever available.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Unleash Your Potential → Lay the Mines → Bring out the Artillery → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Farm Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.
guide.teamfight: Position behind frontline; attack closest safe target. Join fight only after enemy dive cooldowns are used.
guide.highRank: Huang Zhong sits at Tier B globally (51.2% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
comparisons: Huang Zhong vs Hou Yi (Marksman, Tier S+): Hou Yi is 2.9% pick / 49.3% WR. Huang Zhong has +1.9% WR vs Hou Yi in Camp data. Choose Huang Zhong when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Hou Yi for Farm Lane comfort.

Huang Zhong vs Marco Polo (Marksman, Tier S+): Marco Polo is 2.1% pick / 50.1% WR. Huang Zhong has +1.1% WR vs Marco Polo in Camp data. Choose Huang Zhong when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Marco Polo for Farm Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Huang Zhong excels into Xuance, Mai Shiranui, Jing. Avoid blind picking into Kaizer, Dun, Arthur without team peel.
